programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue
programme.desc: Cleaning expert Hayley Leitch and her team of professional cleaners answer SOS calls from Britain's filthiest houses while identifying unhealthy habits which cause mess.

programme.title: Films & Stars
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby: S4
programme.desc: Presenters Giles Coren and Monica Galetti visit locations that represent the ultimate in luxury. In this series, they stay at a design hotel tucked away in a remote part of Iceland, experience the magic of the desert at a secluded Abu Dhabi resort, and venture beyond the lobby at London's most expensive - and exclusive - hotel, and more.

programme.title: Nomad with Carlton McCoy
programme.desc: Over a glorious summer of hard work and fantastic food, the series presents a sun-soaked escape to the country along with delicious, inspiring recipes you can try in From the towns of the Mississippi Delta to the bustling alleys of South Korea via diaspora communities, flourishing African townships and volcanic islands, world-class chef, master sommelier and arbiter of cool Carlton McCoy presents a new six-part series exploring the world like never before.

programme.title: Survivor 47
programme.desc: 18 new castaways battle it out on the islands of Fiji for a million dollars and the title of Sole Survivor.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game.

programme.title: The 98th Annual Academy Awards
programme.desc: (Live) The 98th Academy Awards ceremony, presented by the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences, will honor the best films released in 2025.

programme.title: The 98th Annual Academy Awards

programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Mandarin) Super BOOMi follows an animated bear and his friends as they learn and play in a virtual reality game universe.

programme.title: Zoom The White Dolphin S2
programme.desc: Yann, an intrepid 15-year-old and his 7-year-old sister, Marina, live with their Uncle Patrick on the paradise island of Maotou. With Zoom, a white dolphin of exceptional intelligence and other friends from the island, they go on amazing adventures.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game.

programme.title: Slugterra S3
programme.desc: Slugterra is an epic sci-fi comedy adventure set deep underground, where the ammo's alive and only the quick survive! In this luminous, high-tech, underground world every cavern holds a new adventure, new battle and weird little slugs to be discovered!

programme.title: Miniforce V-Rangers S5
programme.desc: Lost his memory, Volt gotta protect the Green Island with his new collegues! Taking advantage of mysterious Energy Fairies, evil Dr. Sparke tries to dominate the Green Island. Dr. Chico saves Energy Fairies, and organizes V Rangers to protect the nature of Green Island.

programme.title: Miniforce V-Rangers S5

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.desc: When Boog and Elliot discover an abandoned Summer Camp in the middle of nowhere, they embark on a brave new adventure of creating a safe and special place to live that welcomes animals of every kind. Under the leadership of Boog and Elliot, the Campers must all work together to help create their own slice of paradise in the middle of the wilderness and to rediscover their inner wild.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature

Under the leadership of Boog and Elliot, the Campers must all work together to help create their own slice of paradise in the middle of the wilderness and to rediscover their inner wild.

programme.title: Saving Me
programme.desc: A super genius billionaire goes back in time to teach his 11-year-old self to be a better person.

programme.title: Pokemon Ultimate Journeys: The Series
programme.desc: The stakes are higher than ever for Ash, Goh, and Chloe as they advance toward their goals! As the Pokmon World Coronation Series tournament heats up, intensive training is in store for Ash, Pikachu, and their Pokmon friends.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: On The Red Dot offers weekly in-depth analysis and discussion on key issues and events that matter to Singaporeans.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: We eat protein bars thinking they're healthy high in protein, low in sugar and good for muscle recovery. But what's really inside them, and are they as healthy as they claim?

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: Ah Hock manages to patch up with Debbie over a gift but Ella doesn't buy it. Handsome is increasingly frustrated after being grounded. Louis' suspicions on Julius' philandering grow when the private investigator sends him incriminating photos.

programme.title: Lion Mums S4
programme.desc: Min Yi is left frustrated and helpless after an injury forces her to take leave from work - and puts her probation at risk. At Charleston, Grace tries to help Ruby after her stunning accusation, while Mrs Wang and Miss Sim's scheming leads to an unfortunate "accident". Margaret asks Chae for a new phone after her old model causes her to be left out at school.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef's Line?

programme.title: The Chase S16
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Lingo USA S2
programme.desc: In this game show, hosted by the iconic RuPaul, the simplest of words could be worth thousands of dollars. Lingo is the fast paced word-play game that keeps on innovating for new audiences, with its mix of skill, tension, humour and the chance to win big cash prizes. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: Aunty Lee and her gang's attempts to catch the Killer Litterer fail spectacularly, while Salim enlists Nina's help to investigate an abusive foreign worker agency hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Double Yummy
programme.desc: FISH FRENZY: Indian Curry Fish Head vs Anping Fish Head Claypot Bold spices meet bubbling claypots as the hosts explore how each city elevates humble fish to wondrous heights. Singapore's iconic Indian Curry Fish Head turns up the heat with rich aromatics and tender meat-on-the-bone. Meanwhile in Taiwan, a family-run soulful Fish Head Claypot steals the spotlight with gentle stewing, clean flavours and homestyle comfort.

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club S2
programme.desc: While life in the idyllic town of Marlow has just about returned to normal after a chain of murders rattled the tightly knit community, it's not long before retired archaeologist Judith Potts, dog-walker Suzie Harris, and Vicar's wife Becks Starling are called back into action to solve a series of new crimes that befall the local residents.

programme.title: Transplant S4
programme.desc: June and Novak are at odds. Theo jeopardizes his safety to help a patient and decides on a major change.Bash steps up when urgently needed and pursues his professional dream.

programme.title: Go Jetters: Sr2
programme.desc: The series has lots more of the comedy, teamwork, great gadgets (including a brand new vehicle), awesome sights and funky facts about amazing landmarks that young viewers and their parents have come to love. Travelling the world with their teacher, mentor and friend Ubercorn, a disco-grooving unicorn, the Go Jetters are fixing the mishaps caused by the mischievous meddlings of Grandmaster Glitch in new locations including Central Park in New York, Machu Picchu, China, Japan, Mali, and Petra.

programme.title: Long Weekends
programme.desc: Kimberly heads to Illoilo in Philippines to explore the "City of Love" of Asia. BUT - she will also have to complete a bingo card of must-do activities and stick to a strict budget challenge. Can she find all the best food and sights and still stay under 600? Watch to see her journey and get inspired for your own trip to this incredible city!

programme.title: Scene City: In the Bedroom of Mountain King
programme.desc: Phinn is a young boy who falls within the autism spectrum. His father, Edward struggles to raise him alone. Worried of people not understanding Phinn's condition, he is constantly afraid of interactions with neighbours with the fear of Phinn offending them. He avoids interaction, small talks and maintains minimal eye contact with others.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: A Librarian -- a custodian of a magical repository of the world's most powerful and dangerous supernatural artifacts -- from the past travels to the present and finds himself unable to return to his own time. When he returns to his castle, which is now a museum, he inadvertently releases magic across the continent. In order to set things right, he is given a new team of Librarians to help him clean up the mess he made.

programme.title: 敦煌千年不散的宴席
programme.desc: 中华民族之所以五千年生生不息绵延不绝就是因为我们的语言文字风俗饮食都是千年传承从来没有中断观众发现以往秦川安秋导演创作的敦煌纪录片都承载了非常厚重的历史文化信息这次的美食片却大不一样从主题定位人物故事叙事方式等都有了非常大的改变叙述风格也生动活泼了很多让观众看到了更多的人间烟火一种田园诗般的美该片通过将敦煌壁画饮食文化呈现出来并将当下敦煌百姓的生活状态一日三餐加工食物的过程忠实记录下来以展现敦煌饮食文化的传承与发展.

In CABAR, Zaki and Yusoff complete their volunteering mission with youth, marking a meaningful close to their challenge.

programme.title: Indonesia Authentic Places
programme.desc: For most of the time, Indonesia is a magnet for most travelers and adventurers. With more than seventeen thousand islands scattered across over five million kilometers and three time zones that needs a lifetime to explore and appreciate its natural beauty. Same with its title, the program sums it all up into twenty-five must-visit authentic destinations that simply cannot be missed. From defining beaches to magical mountains and wild forests, be prepared to be amazed by authentic Indonesia.

Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

Soulful musical performances set the festive mood and a lively gossip segment dishes out the latest in Tamil cinema and Vasantham programs. Get ready to celebrate our festivals like never before!
